title: SunOverlay
description: Editorial overlay for the Sun per locale (ADR-017). One file at data/i18n/[locale]/sun.json. Merged with sun.json at fetch time.

fact.description: One-paragraph editorial summary surfaced in the OVERVIEW tab.

bio.description: Editorial paragraph contextualising the astrophysical figures shown in the TECHNICAL tab.

links.description: Tiered learn-more links for the LEARN tab (v0.1.10). Same shape as mission.links — intro / core / deep tiers.
